title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 138.300 - Powers of agents
text:
138.300.  Powers of agents. — In the discharge of his duties an agent has all the powers of an inquisitional nature granted in sections 138.190 to 138.490 to the commission and all powers lawful throughout the state given by law to a notary public relative to depositions.
(RSMo 1939 § 11024, A.L. 1945 p. 1805 § 10, A.L. 1959 H.B. 107) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9851; 1919 § 12844
